title: UsageEvent v1
description: Canonical on-the-wire shape for one model-call telemetry event reported by any tenant — Python adapters, Cloudflare workers, edge Pages Functions, or any external client authenticated with a bus token. Cost fields use integer micros (1e-6 of a currency unit) making the schema currency-agnostic: USD, $MIND token units, or any operator-defined unit. The record is self-describing: tenant, provider, model, and occurred_at are all embedded so the record needs no surrounding context to be useful.

schema_version.description: UsageEvent schema version this instance conforms to. Required so v1 and future v1.x / v2 instances are distinguishable at read time.

id.description: UUID v4 uniquely identifying this event. Assigned by the emitter.

tenant.description: Tenant slug — must match the bus-token's project/tenant scope.

endpoint.description: Tenant-side endpoint that triggered the call, e.g. '/api/archetype-report'. Optional.

input_tokens.description: Number of input/prompt tokens consumed by this call.

output_tokens.description: Number of output/completion tokens generated by this call.

image_count.description: Number of images submitted — used for flat-billed image models.

cost_micros.description: Integer micros (1e-6 currency units) of the call cost. USD entries with cost_cents can convert: cost_micros = cost_cents * 10_000.

cost_currency.description: Currency code for cost_micros. Upper-case alphanumeric, 2-10 chars. Common: USD, MIND. Operator-defined codes allowed.

metadata.description: Tenant-side free-form correlation bag. Examples: request_id, report_id, session_id.

occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the model call occurred on the tenant side.

received_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was received by the SOS economy endpoint.
